narrative:
Precinct Conneaut 3-A (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 318 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.6 percentage points.
